chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-179 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 30.08.2022 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Also on the last date of hearing no one was present. Petition is dismissed inprosecution along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
